title: ToolTreaux Waterproof Storage Container Lanyard Translucent Durable Plastic
description:
The ToolTreaux waterproof storage container is a great option for keeping valuables and small items safe and secure. It features a fitted O-ring lid that will ensure your items won’t be affected by poor weather conditions or leaks. The storage container itself is made of durable, high-quality translucent plastic so you can easily identify your important items like credit cards, money, keys, and medicine. The plastic is both waterproof and dustproof which will protect your valuables and keep them dry. Each waterproof storage container comes with a sturdy nylon lanyard with a stopper so you can adjust the length for custom comfort and fit. Hang it around your neck, from your tool belt or from a travel bag for easy access on the go

  • STURDY HANG LANYARD - Each waterproof container comes with a sturdy nylon black lanyard that can be used to hang around your neck, from your belt or backpack for convenience; Easily access your items while on the go
  • COMPACT DESIGN - Storage container measures 5.25” x 3” x 1.25” and weighs 3.52oz so it won’t add a bunch of bulk; Easily fits inside most pockets, backpacks, and travel bags.
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Material: waterproof and dustproof plastic; nylon lanyard; Colors: translucent, Dimensions: 5.25” x 3” x 1.25”; Fitted O-ring lid; Weight: 3.52oz (.22lbs)
